tools.epubToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an EPUB e-book file here, or click to browse.
tools.epubToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放EPUB电子书文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.epubToPdf.successMessage.en: Your EPUB file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.epubToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的EPUB文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.mobiToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a MOBI/AZW e-book file here, or click to browse.
tools.mobiToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放MOBI/AZW电子书文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.mobiToPdf.successMessage.en: Your MOBI file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.mobiToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的MOBI文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.fb2ToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop FB2 e-book files here, or click to browse. Supports multiple files.
tools.fb2ToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放FB2电子书文件到此处，或点击浏览。支持多个文件。

tools.fb2ToPdf.successMessage.en: Your FB2 file(s) have been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.fb2ToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的FB2文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.djvuToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a DJVU file here, or click to browse.
tools.djvuToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放DJVU文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.djvuToPdf.dpiHint.en: Higher DPI = larger file size, better quality
tools.djvuToPdf.dpiHint.zh: DPI越高，文件越大，质量越好

tools.djvuToPdf.successMessage.en: Your DJVU file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.djvuToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的DJVU文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.deskewPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files here. You can process up to 10 files at once.
tools.deskewPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，最多可同时处理10个文件。

tools.deskewPdf.thresholdDesc.en: Higher values detect more subtle skew angles. Default: 10
tools.deskewPdf.thresholdDesc.zh: 值越高越能检测到细微的倾斜。默认值：10

tools.deskewPdf.dpiDesc.en: Higher DPI provides more accurate detection but takes longer.
tools.deskewPdf.dpiDesc.zh: DPI越高检测越准确，但处理时间更长。

tools.pdfBooklet.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to create a booklet layout.
tools.pdfBooklet.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以创建小册子布局。

tools.pdfBooklet.gridModeDesc.en: 1x2 is standard for booklets. Use larger grids to save paper.
tools.pdfBooklet.gridModeDesc.zh: 1x2是标准小册子格式，使用更大网格可节省纸张。

tools.pdfBooklet.previewDesc.en: This preview shows how pages will be arranged on each sheet.
tools.pdfBooklet.previewDesc.zh: 此预览显示页面在每张纸上的排列方式。

tools.pdfBooklet.successMessage.en: Booklet created successfully! Click download to save.
tools.pdfBooklet.successMessage.zh: 小册子创建成功！点击下载保存。

tools.rasterizePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to rasterize into images or a new PDF.
tools.rasterizePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以栅格化为图片或新的PDF。

tools.rasterizePdf.pageRangeDesc.en: Leave empty to convert all pages.

tools.rasterizePdf.successMessage.en: Rasterization complete! Click download to save your file.
tools.rasterizePdf.successMessage.zh: 栅格化完成！点击下载保存文件。

tools.emailToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an email file (.eml) to convert to PDF.
tools.emailToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放邮件文件（.eml）以转换为PDF。

tools.cbzToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a comic book archive (.cbz) to convert to PDF.
tools.cbzToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放漫画归档文件（.cbz）以转换为PDF。

tools.pdfToPdfa.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to convert to PDF/A format.
tools.pdfToPdfa.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以转换为PDF/A归档格式。

tools.fontToOutline.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to convert fonts to outlines.
tools.fontToOutline.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以将字体转换为轮廓。

tools.extractTables.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to extract tables from.

tools.extractTables.successMessage.en: Tables extracted successfully! Click download to save.
tools.extractTables.successMessage.zh: 表格提取成功！点击下载保存。

tools.ocgManager.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF to manage its layers (OCG).
tools.ocgManager.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以管理其图层（OCG）。

tools.pdfReader.uploadDescription.en: Open a PDF file to read and view.
tools.pdfReader.uploadDescription.zh: 打开PDF文件进行阅读和查看。

tools.findAndRedact.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to search and redact text.
tools.findAndRedact.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以搜索并遮盖文本。

tools.findAndRedact.searchTermPlaceholde.en: Enter text to search (e.g., account number, name)...
tools.findAndRedact.searchTermPlaceholde.zh: 输入要搜索的文本（如账号、姓名等）...

tools.findAndRedact.searchInputPlacehold.en: Enter search terms, separated by commas...
tools.findAndRedact.searchInputPlacehold.zh: 输入搜索词，用逗号分隔多个词...

tools.findAndRedact.searchInputHelp.en: Tip: Separate multiple terms with commas (,)
tools.findAndRedact.searchInputHelp.zh: 提示：用逗号分隔多个搜索词（支持中英文逗号）

tools.findAndRedact.multipleTermsPlaceho.en:
Enter search terms (one per line or comma-separated)...
Example:
John Doe
account123
555-1234
tools.findAndRedact.multipleTermsPlaceho.zh:
输入搜索词（每行一个或用逗号分隔）...
示例：
张三
account123
555-1234

tools.findAndRedact.enterSearchTerm.en: Please enter at least one search term.
tools.findAndRedact.enterSearchTerm.zh: 请输入至少一个搜索词。

tools.findAndRedact.noMatchesFound.en: No matches found for the search terms.

tools.findAndRedact.selectMatchesToRedac.en: Please select at least one match to redact.
tools.findAndRedact.selectMatchesToRedac.zh: 请至少选择一处匹配进行遮盖。

tools.findAndRedact.warningText.en: Redaction is permanent. Once applied, the original content cannot be recovered.
tools.findAndRedact.warningText.zh: 遮盖是永久性的。一旦应用，原始内容将无法恢复。

tools.findAndRedact.successMessage.en: Successfully redacted the selected text! Click download to save.
tools.findAndRedact.successMessage.zh: 选中的文本已成功遮盖！点击下载保存。
